headline: Silvergate settles with SEC for $10M penalty

article.title: Silvergate’s Fraher breaks silence on settlement with Gensler’s SEC
article.summary: Former Silvergate executive Kate Fraher said the rule that prevented her from sharing her side of the story was unconstitutional. It was finally lifted by the SEC this week.

headline: $1Bn Crypto Losses: Tax Evaders Exploit New Assets

article.title: Tax evaders are trying ‘novel digital assets’ to dodge authorities: Chainalysis
article.summary: Italian authorities uncovered a tax evasion scheme in which an individual allegedly used Bitcoin Ordinals and the BRC-20 token standard to generate and conceal $1.1 million.

headline: Junk Bonds Surge 15% Amid Rising Risk Concerns

article.title: Junk Debt’s Red-Hot Rally Sparks Complacency Fears as Risk Rises
article.summary: Junk debt is beating just about everything else in fixed-income markets after surging yields wiped out gains on most other bonds. Yet with high-yield credit spreads near two-decade lows, investor unease is building.

headline: Deere Holds Outlook Amid 10% Construction Sales Jump

article.title: Deere Keeps Outlook With Construction Boost as Farmers Struggle
article.summary: Deere & Co. reiterated its annual profit outlook Thursday as gains in construction and forestry helped to offset a still-slumping agricultural economy.
